subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。両手の親指で、人差し指の糸の下を通って小指手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: From "Opening A", with both thumbs pass under the index-finger strings and pick up the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の薬指小指を、人差し指の前にある三角の輪に上から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert the ring and little fingers on both hands down into the triangular loops in front of the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の薬指小指で、人差し指手前の糸の下を通って親指向こうの糸を挟みます
subtitle.en: With both ring and little fingers, pass under the near index-finger strings and pinch the far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の薬指小指で挟んだ糸を引き出します。引き出した糸は小指にかかります
subtitle.en: Draw out the strings pinched by the ring and little fingers; the drawn strings fall onto the little fingers.

subtitle.ja: 両手の人差し指の糸を外して完成です
subtitle.en: Release both index-finger strings to complete the figure.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の上の輪を外すことで、ベッドが壊れて眠っていた男が転がり落ちます
subtitle.en: By releasing the upper loops on both index fingers, the bed collapses and the sleeper rolls off.
